item.title: ChatGPT
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
What Is ChatGPT?

ChatGPT is an AI assistant built by OpenAI. It helps with writing, research, coding, brainstorming and everyday productivity tasks. It is the most widely used AI tool in the world with over 100 million users.

Pricing Truth

Plan Cost What You Get
Free $0/month GPT-4o limited daily use
Plus $20/month GPT-4o unlimited and plugins
Team $25/user/month Shared workspace
Enterprise Custom Advanced security

Hidden fees: None

Free tier quality: Good for basic daily use

item.title: About AlphaFlowGridAI
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
About AlphaFlowGridAI

AlphaFlowGridAI is an independent directory of AI tools and SaaS products built for solopreneurs, freelancers, creators and founders who want to work smarter.

We review, rate and compare hundreds of tools so you can find the right one without wasting time or money.

Our Mission

The internet is full of fake reviews, paid placements and biased recommendations. We built AlphaFlowGridAI to be different.

Every tool we list is:

item.title: Affiliate Disclaimer
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
Last updated: June 11, 2026

Affiliate Disclosure

AlphaFlowGridAI is a participant in various affiliate marketing programs. This means we may earn a commission when you click on links to tools and products featured on our site and make a purchase or sign up.

This comes at absolutely no additional cost to you.

How It Works

When you click a “Visit Tool” button or any affiliate link on our site and then make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may receive a small commission from the company.

item.title: Contact AlphaFlowGridAI
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
Contact Us

We would love to hear from you. Whether you want to suggest a tool, enquire about a sponsored listing or just say hello — reach out.

Get In Touch

📧 Email: alphaflowgridai@gmail.com

📌 Pinterest: pinterest.com/alphaflowgrid

📷 Instagram: instagram.com/alphaflowgridai

What You Can Contact Us For

Tool Submissions Know a great AI tool or SaaS product we have not listed yet? Tell us about it and we will review it.

Sponsored Listings Want your tool featured at the top of a category? We offer sponsored listing placements for relevant AI and SaaS products.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
Last updated: May 09, 2026

This Privacy Notice for AlphaFlowGridAI describes how and why we might access, collect, store, use and share your personal information when you use our services, including when you:

  • Visit our website at alphaflowgridai.pages.dev or any website of ours that links to this Privacy Notice
  • Use AlphaFlowGridAI — AI tools recommendations, blogging resources, affiliate marketing content, productivity tools and creator tutorials
  • Engage with us in other related ways, including any marketing or events

Questions or concerns? Reading this Privacy Notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services. If you have questions, contact us at alphaflowgrid@gmail.com.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.author: alphaflowgrid@gmail.com (AlphaFlowGridAI)
item.description:
Last updated: June 11, 2026

Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using AlphaFlowGridAI.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using AlphaFlowGridAI at alphaflowgridai.pages.dev, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

2. About AlphaFlowGridAI

AlphaFlowGridAI is an independent directory website that reviews, rates and compares AI tools and SaaS products. We provide honest reviews, pricing information and recommendations to help users make informed decisions.
